steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank completes a relative clause modifying "mouthpiece." A relative clause uses declarative word order (subject before verb), and the full sentence is a statement, so it must end with a period.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — where is sound made.: Inverted (question) word order inside a declarative clause. Grammatically incorrect. ✗
  • Choice B — where sound is made?: Correct word order, but ends with a question mark. The sentence is a statement, not a question. ✗
  • Choice C — where sound is made.: Declarative word order and ends with a period. Grammatically correct. ✓
  • Choice D — where is sound made?: Both errors at once — inverted word order and a question mark. ✗
C is correct.
